parameters.formDescription: Please fulfill all of the fields

values.formSubmittedText: Thank you! Your onboarding is in progress.  You'll receive a welcome email shortly and a calendar invite for your welcome call

additionalFields.description: =Welcome call with new client from the "{{ $json['Company Name'] }}" company.  Client email: {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['Email'] }} Client phone: {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['Phone'] }}
additionalFields.summary: =Welcome Call - {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['First Name'] }} {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['Last Name'] }}

messageValues.message: =generate a warm and professional welcome email for a new client based on the information provided? The message should be friendly, brief, and personalized—while still sounding professional. It should reflect the client’s industry and their goals for our collaboration. Make sure to always end the email with the following sign-off: Best regards, Maryam VP of Internal Relations MBcomp Do not use placeholders like [Your Name] or [Your Contact Information] under any circumstances, even if some information is missing. Always respond ONLY in this exact JSON format with no extra text, no markdown, no code fences: {"Subject": "...", "Body": "...", "Email": "..."}

Write a professional 2-sentence CRM summary using only the provided contact data.  - Do not add, infer, or assume any information not explicitly given. - If the data is insufficient, return a generic but accurate summary.  Return ONLY valid JSON: {"Summary": "..."}

value.Name: ={{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['First Name'] }} {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['Last Name'] }}
={{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['First Name'] }} {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['Last Name'] }}

parameters.text:
=You are a professional client success manager at MBcamp.

Write a short, warm follow-up email to a client who onboarded 2 days ago.
The email should:
- Check in and ask how they are settling in
- Offer help if they have any questions
- Feel personal, not automated
- Be no longer than 5 sentences

Client information:
Name: {{ $json['Client Name'] }}
Industry: {{ $json.Industry }}
email: {{ $json.Email }}

Make sure to always end with:
Best regards,
Maryam
VP of Internal Relations
MBcomp

Always respond ONLY in this exact JSON format with no extra text, no markdown, no code fences:
{"Subject": "...", "Body": "...", "Email": "..."}

conditions.rightValue: ={{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['First Name'] }} {{ $('Clean Form data').item.json['Last Name'] }}
